settings.title: Sustainability
settings.text: We use responsibly sourced materials and partner with mills powered by renewable energy.

settings.title: Quality
settings.text: Every piece is crafted with care, using premium fabrics that feel as good as they look.

settings.title: Timeless Design
settings.text: We create versatile pieces that transcend seasons and trends — made to be worn again and again.

settings.heading: About Paperbag
settings.mission_text: Where comfort meets conscience. Our fabrics are soft on you and gentle on the planet.
